name: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 7B CPU Service
description: OpenAI-compatible CPU inference service for deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B on Magnus GU. The model is expected at /data/$USER/models/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B.
job_description: Run llama.cpp OpenAI-compatible server for DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B with 32 CPU cores and high RAM for 50-way request concurrency.
entry_command:
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 7B CPU service ==="
echo "time: $(date -Is)"
echo "user: $(whoami)"
echo "MAGNUS_PORT=${MAGNUS_PORT}"

USERNAME="$(whoami)"
MODEL_DIR="/data/${USERNAME}/models/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B"
GGUF_DIR="/data/${USERNAME}/models/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B-GGUF"
GGUF_FILE="${GGUF_DIR}/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-7b-q4_k_m.gguf"
LLAMA_CPP_DIR="/data/${USERNAME}/apps/llama.cpp"

echo "MODEL_DIR=${MODEL_DIR}"
echo "GGUF_FILE=${GGUF_FILE}"

if [ ! -f "${MODEL_DIR}/config.json" ]; then
  echo "[error] ModelScope model not found under ${MODEL_DIR}. Run download_model_auto.py first." >&2
  exit 10
fi

mkdir -p "${GGUF_DIR}" "/data/${USERNAME}/apps"
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates cmake build-essential pkg-config
fi
python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir -q --upgrade pip
python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir -q 'huggingface_hub>=0.23' 'transformers>=4.41' 'sentencepiece' 'protobuf' 'numpy' 'gguf'

if [ ! -x "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}/build/bin/llama-server" ]; then
  echo "=== building llama.cpp server under /data cache ==="
  if [ ! -d "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}/.git" ]; then
    git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp.git "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}"
  fi
  cmake -S "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}" -B "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}/build" -DGGML_NATIVE=ON -DGGML_OPENMP=ON -DLLAMA_CURL=OFF -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
  cmake --build "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}/build" --config Release -j "$(nproc)" --target llama-server
fi

if [ ! -f "${GGUF_FILE}" ]; then
  echo "=== converting safetensors to GGUF f16 ==="
  python3 "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}/convert_hf_to_gguf.py" "${MODEL_DIR}" --outfile "${GGUF_DIR}/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-7b-f16.gguf" --outtype f16
  echo "=== quantizing GGUF to Q4_K_M for CPU serving ==="
  "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}/build/bin/llama-quantize" "${GGUF_DIR}/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-7b-f16.gguf" "${GGUF_FILE}" Q4_K_M
fi

echo "=== starting llama.cpp OpenAI-compatible server ==="
exec "${LLAMA_CPP_DIR}/build/bin/llama-server" \
  --model "${GGUF_FILE}" \
  --host 0.0.0.0 \
  --port "${MAGNUS_PORT}" \
  --threads 32 \
  --ctx-size 4096 \
  --parallel 50 \
  --cont-batching \
  --cache-reuse 256 \
  --mlock \
  --metrics \
  --alias deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-7b
